title: Replication Data for: "The energy budgets of giant impacts"

# Replication Data for: "The energy budgets of giant impacts"

Authors: Carter, Philip J., Lock, Simon J., Stewart, Sarah T.
Published: 2020-01-07T20:38:43Z
Subjects: Astronomy and Astrophysics, Earth and Environmental Sciences, Physics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/YYNJSX

This dataset contains data from the article: Carter, P. J.; Lock, S. J. and Stewart, S. T., 2019, "The energy budgets of giant impacts", JGR: Planets, in press, https://doi.org/10.1029/2019JE006042. These data consist of giant impact simulation input files, processed data used to create the figures in the article, select simulation output and code to read input/output files, and EOS tables for use with the GADGET2 code. See the README file for further information.

Citation: Carter, Philip J.; Lock, Simon J.; Stewart, Sarah T., 2019, "Replication Data for: "The energy budgets of giant impacts"", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/YYNJSX, Harvard Dataverse, V2, UNF:6:HAdZyxMh2CTaQ/STxFCARA== [fileUNF]
